Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-python3, dh-sequence-sphinxdoc, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-dask, python3-dask-sphinx-theme <!nodoc>, python3-numpy, python3-pandas, python3-pims, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-scipy, python3-setuptools, python3-setuptools-scm, python3-sphinx <!nodoc>, python3-tifffile
Description: Distributed image processing with dask Features: * Support focuses on Dask Arrays. * Provides support for loading image files. * Implements commonly used N-D filters. * Includes a few N-D Fourier filters. * Provides some functions for working with N-D label images. * Supports a few N-D morphological operators.
Package-List: python-dask-image-doc deb doc optional arch=all python3-dask-image deb python optional arch=all
